items.title: Competitive Programming
items.subtitle: LeetCode Top 10%
items.description: Solved 300+ algorithmic problems on LeetCode, ranking in the top 10% globally. Focus on data structures, dynamic programming, and problem solving. Active participant in coding competitions and hackathons.

items.title: Problem Solving

items.description: Love making software solutions that help people. Passionate about identifying real-world problems and crafting elegant technical solutions that make a difference.

items.title: Chess
items.subtitle: 1650 Elo | Tournament Player
items.description: Competitive chess player with an Elo rating of 1650. Regular participant in chess tournaments, combining strategic thinking with tactical precision. Love analyzing openings and endgame positions.

items.title: Table Tennis
items.subtitle: Recreational Sport
items.description: Enjoy playing table tennis for both competition and recreation. Great way to maintain quick reflexes and strategic thinking while having fun.

items.title: Fictional Writing

items.description: Crafting fictional narratives and exploring creative storytelling. Writing allows me to blend imagination with structured thinking, creating engaging stories and worlds.
